item.title: Oracle 发布 Oracle AI Agent Memory 26.6，提供“带收据的内存”
item.summary: Oracle is introducing AI Agent Memory 26.6, high-accuracy, low-latency, enterprise-grade memory for agents that operate where the stakes are real. Agent Memory 26.6 introduces hybrid search, combining: - Vector search for semantic understanding - Keyword search for names, identifiers, and exact language - scoped retrie
